text: Hi, are we still on for lunch tomorrow at noon?

Reminder: your dentist appointment is on Thursday at 3pm. Reply C to confirm.

The team standup is moved to 10:30 today. See the calendar invite.

Happy birthday! Hope you have a wonderful day with the family.
Project update: the staging deploy passed all tests. Merging now.
